channel.title: Combine on Benjamin Robinson - Personal Website & Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Combine on Benjamin Robinson - Personal Website & Blog

item.title: Riser or Faller? Mock Draft Stock and the NFL Combine
item.description: Run, Rich, Run! alt text For people who follow the NFL Draft, the draft process can be readily demarcated into managable chunks: the end of the college football season bleeds into draft declarations which then transition smoothly to the playoffs and the Super Bowl to the college All Star games and finally to where we are now: the NFL Scouting Combine. The Combine marks the last major milestone (pretty much) before we reach the draft in all its glory in late April.
